tweets.text:
Hi, I’m Joshua Lorcy!

Pokemon VGC player & Community Ambassador with 6 years of tournament experience and 3 years casting grassroots and unofficial Pokemon events.

I enjoy breaking down gameplay while keeping broadcasts engaging for both new and experienced viewers.

DMs open!

300K subscribers on YouTube!!!

Thank you so much to everyone for watching my content and for supporting me

Getting to do this full-time for the past few months has truly felt like a dream come true and I’m so grateful for all of you and this amazing community 💙
